narrative:
Swancreek West (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,285 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.0 percentage points.
